detectors.description:
WADCoin.setMigrationAgent(address)._agent (WADCoin.sol#735) lacks a zero-check on :
		- migrationAgent = _agent (WADCoin.sol#743)

Owned.transferOwnership(address).newOwner (WADCoin.sol#137) lacks a zero-check on :
		- owner = newOwner (WADCoin.sol#139)

WADCoin.extendLock(bytes32,uint256) (WADCoin.sol#641-657) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool)(tokensLocked(msg.sender,_reason,block.timestamp) > 0) (WADCoin.sol#649)
